description: French telemedicine pioneer offering on-demand video consultations without appointments. First company approved by French Ministry of Health for telemedicine. ISO 9001, 27001, 27701, and HDS certified.
business_model: B2C - Direct to patients, reimbursed by French social security; B2B for corporate clients
target_market: French consumers needing immediate medical consultations
competitive_advantage: First MOH-approved telemedicine platform in France, highest security certifications, French Tech member

varden_fit.rationale: Could be partner for occupational health services in France - strong regulatory positioning
